content.en:
"Really?"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master asked in surprise.

He is a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, and Ye Tian is only an invincible Dao Ancestor, although his combat power is comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, no matter how powerful the Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor is, he is not the opponent of the half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm half-step domain ancestor, and the difference in strength between the two sides is too big.

If it was just one move, the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm might be able to catch it.

But this time, Ye Tian mainly asked for three minutes to fight.

Three minutes was also a long time for the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and they didn't know how many times they had fought in an instant.

The Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor could easily kill the top-notch Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor within three minutes.

He didn't understand why Ye Tian did this.

"Naturally, take it seriously!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I agreed!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master said with a smile.

Ye Tian had to send 30 places to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, if he didn't accept it, he would be stupid!

For him, he won 100 per cent.

The other side.

Jinchen Daozu was still trying his best to persuade him, but Ye Tian didn't explain at all.

No amount of explanation is useless, because Jinchen Daozu will not believe it at all.

Maybe the difference between 30 places and 50 places is not much, but for the Terrans, one more place is one more strong person, so each place is very precious.

Since he had brought 50 Terran powerhouses, he had to let them all have the opportunity to enter the Ancient Realm Tree Origin Lake.

A piece of uninhabited territory not far from the Ancient Boundary Tree.

Ye Tian confronted the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, and the two were about to make a move.

Jin Chen Daozu was watching the battle not far away, he had already made up his mind in his heart, once Ye Tian was about to fall, he would definitely take action to save Ye Tian.

No matter how stupid Ye Tian is, after all, he is a genius with the greatest potential in Black Wind Mountain, and he will definitely be able to become a half-step domain ancestor in the One Realm in the future, and he is even expected to become the strongest existence under the domain ancestor.

Therefore, he must keep Ye Tian, which is also the order of the Wind Mountain Lord.

And the idea of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was different, he wanted to kill Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's potential is too great, the invincible Dao Ancestor is comparable to the top Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor, what a terrifying potential this is!

Even if it was the Divine Heaven Realm, there was no such invincible Dao Ancestor.

Once Ye Tian is allowed to continue to grow, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will have a hard time under Ye Tian's suppression.

Before, the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain had been protecting Ye Tian, and even the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain had come forward to stop the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, so the Heavenly Emperor Palace had no chance to kill Ye Tian at all.

This time is different, he can fight with Ye Tian in the bright light.

Once he was fast enough, it would be enough to kill Ye Tian in an instant, so that Jinchen Dao Ancestor would not have time to rescue.

"Let's shoot!"

Ye Tian said.

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master took out his new weapon, the Thunder Tribulation Sword!

This is the latest half-domain weapon created by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, with the skeleton of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle as the main material, plus many rare materials, it was finally made into this half-domain device, and it is a relatively good half-domain device.

It's a pity that the Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't have a top-notch half-domain weapon-level refiner, otherwise these materials are enough to create the top-notch half-domain weapon.

But for Ye Tian, such a weapon is good enough.

"Thunder Blitz!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master made a move in an instant, and as soon as he made a move, he used all his strength, and used the forbidden Dao technique that he became famous for, the Thunder Blitz.

When he didn't become a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, his Thunder Blitz was only in the Xiaocheng realm, but after entering the Gate of the Stone Pupil, after a long period of hard cultivation, he finally cultivated the Thunder Blitz to the Dacheng level.

Dacheng-level Forbidden Dao Technique Thunder Blitz Strike plus Half-Domain Weapon Thunder Tribulation Sword, plus the power of his Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

The power of this sword was terrifying, reaching an incredible level, and even an ordinary Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor would not dare to say that he was unscathed under such an attack.

In the face of this sword, Ye Tian no longer hid his strength.

"Mixed Element Holy Body!"

"The power of the Extreme Dao!"

"Dark Pole Spear!"

Ye Tian held the Dark Extreme Dao Spear and stabbed it fiercely, colliding with the Thunder Blitz Sword.

The power of the Extreme Dao is so terrifying, plus Ye Tian's Dark Extreme Dao Spear has also cultivated to the peak realm of Dacheng, and it is only one step away from the consummation realm.

At this moment, his attack power had already reached the full force of the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, and it was not weaker than the full force of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord.

Bang!!!!

The two collided and flew upside down.

This scene completely stunned everyone, even Jinchen Daozu.

"How could this be, the attack power of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor has actually reached the level of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!!!"

Jin Chen Daozu couldn't believe it.

This is a break in the rules!

Can the Invincible Dao Ancestor be so powerful?

The other invincible Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain were dumbfounded, they were all invincible Dao Ancestors, and their strength was simply ants compared to Ye Tian!

How can there be such a big gap between people?

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master were constantly fighting, and he who had exerted the power of the Extreme Dao was a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, even if he couldn't last long, he didn't have any problem holding on for three minutes.

As time passed, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master became more and more shocked.

At first, he thought that Ye Tian was only relying on some special means to exert a full force that was comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm.

But now, Ye Tian has used that kind of means again and again, this is not a special means, but a conventional means.

No matter how Ye Tian did it, but to be able to fight with the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor for a long time, that is, a Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, everyone agrees.

Soon, three minutes passed.

Ye Tian and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master were separated, and no one on either side could help anyone.

However, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord did not consume much, but Ye Tian consumed a lot, if he fought for a few more minutes, he estimated that he would not be able to hold on, his strength would be greatly reduced, and even the combat power of the top Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor could not be maintained.

At this time, the Lord of the Thunder Tribulation Palace was in a very bad mood.

I thought that everything was safe, but now something has gone wrong.

This time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace not only did not get Ye Tian's 30 places, but also lost 50 places, leaving only 350 places, fortunately, he was the only two Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor in his Heavenly Emperor Palace, and his status was equal to that of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, so no one dared to punish him.

But he was very angry in his heart, but he was embarrassed to regret it.

After all, he agreed to the condition in front of everyone, and if he repented, the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not only lose face, but also completely lose its reputation.
